message.content:
Fix error state types across 15+ pages in `/Users/admin/it-asset/app/`. The goal is to change all error-related `useState("")` to `useState(null)` and update the boolean checks accordingly. ## Files and patterns to fix These 15 files have error states initialized as empty string `""`: 1. `app/home/page.tsx:30` — `const [error, setError] = useState("");` 2. `app/tickets/page.tsx:48` — `const [error, setError] = useState("");` 3. `app/apply/page.tsx:23` — `const [recommendError, setRecommendError] = useState("");` 4. `app/apply/page.tsx:25` — `const [submitError, setSubmitError] = useState("");` 5. `app/my-assets/page.tsx:30` — `const [error, setError] = useState("");` 6. `app/dept-board/page.tsx:23` — `const [error, setError] = useState("");` 7. `app/approvals/page.tsx:28` — `const [error, setError] = useState("");` 8. `app/notifications/page.tsx:24` — `const [error, setError] = useState("");` 9. `app/login/page.tsx:13` — `const [error, setError] = useState("");` 10. `app/it/home/page.tsx:19` — `const [error, setError] = useState("");` 11. `app/it/tickets/page.tsx:50` — `const [error, setError] = useState("");` 12. `app/it/assets/page.tsx:53` — `const [error, setError] = useState("");` 13. `app/it/assets/[id]/page.tsx:48` — `const [error, setError] = useState("");` 14. `app/it/models/page.tsx:24` — `const [error, setError] = useState("");` 15. `app/it/inbound/page.tsx:19` — `const [error, setError] = useState("");` 16. `app/exec/dashboard/page.tsx:33` — `const [error, setError] = useState("");` 17. `app/exec/insights/page.tsx:12` — `const [triageError, setTriageError] = useState("");` ## Changes for each file ### Step 1: Change the useState ``` OLD: const [error, setError] = useState(""); NEW: const [error, setError] = useState(null); ``` Same for `recommendError`, `submitError`, `triageError`. ### Step 2: Change setError("") → setError(null) Every `setError("")` call should become `setError(null)`. ### Step 3: Change boolean checks ``` OLD: if (error) { NEW: if (error !== null) { OLD: {error && ( NEW: {error !== null && ( ``` BUT read each file carefully — in some files like `login/page.tsx`, the error display block uses `{error &&

{error}

}` which renders the string content. These still need `{error !== null &&

{error}

}`. ## Important rules - Read each file before editing - Only change error-related states (skip any non-error states using `""`) - For login/page.tsx the error is displayed inline: `{error &&

{error}

}` — change the check but keep the rendering - Some pages may set error in multiple places (setError on catch, setError("") on retry) — change ALL of them - After all edits, run `npx tsc --noEmit` to verify TypeScript compiles clean

3. Verify with TypeScript
